issues.detail: Skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Skill file contains verbose explanatory sections beyond necessary instructions.
Skill is vendor-locked to GCP and relies on GCP-specific tools.

scenarios.name: Monthly cost review investigating a bill spike
scenarios.rationale: Baseline points at the Console dashboard; treatment pulls BigQuery billing export with cost-by-service and cost-by-label SQL, runs MachineTypeRecommender + IdleResourceRecommender via gcloud recommender, and wires budget pubsub for auto-shutdown.

scenarios.name: Architectural cost review of a job processor
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests smaller VMs and Spot; treatment challenges the always-on architecture, replaces 6 VMs with Cloud Run Jobs + Pub/Sub for a 70%+ cut, adds the Standard->Nearline->Coldline->Archive lifecycle policy, and defers CUDs until 12+ months of stable consumption.
